title: paronychia incana
intro: Paronychia incana, also known as the woolly paronychia, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting gut health. Herbal preparations of Paronychia incana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
